intervals.name: Warmup
intervals.purpose: Prepare system and elevate heart rate

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Rep 1/1. 15:00 at 68%. This is the price of being better. Pay it.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: 0% complete. Rep 1/1. 68% at 85-95 rpm. Hold form — don't let it drift.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: Final interval! 15:00 at 68%. Then you're done. Make it count.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: Rep 1/1. 68% FTP. Your legs filed a complaint. It's under review. (It's not.)
coachingNotes.MIXED: 0% into session. 68%, 85-95 rpm. Focus and execute.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: 15 minutes of base work. This feels like nothing. That's exactly the point.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: 10% complete. 75% FTP. Endurance pace: majority nose breathing. Stay easy.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: Easy miles = fast racing. 75% for 120:00. Trust the process.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: 15 minutes of endurance. The pace where you question if you're working hard enough. (You are.)
coachingNotes.MIXED: Zone 2 endurance. 75% FTP, 85-95 rpm. Sustainable all day.

intervals.name: Cool-down
intervals.purpose: Gradually lower heart rate and begin recovery

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Interval 1/1. 135 minutes in. Your legs are lying. You have more.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: Interval 1 of 1. Target: 60% FTP, 85-95 rpm. 0 intervals remaining.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: 90% done. 0 intervals left. You've come this far. Finish strong.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: 90% complete. Fun fact: suffering builds character. You're very character-rich right now.
coachingNotes.MIXED: Interval 1. 0 to go. 0 minutes total. You've got this.
